FeedVector
https://feedvector.com

About:
FeedVector is the #1 social media scheduling app and an AI platform for planning, creating, and publishing posts across channels with automation and analytics.

Features:
- Content planning and calendar
- AI caption and post generation (including both images and videos)
- A canva-like design tool inside the app for designing posts/graphics
- Multi-channel scheduling and cross-posting
- Team collaboration and approvals
- Asset library and brand templates
- Analytics and performance insights
- Automation rules and workflows
- UTM and link tracking
- Simple and affordable pricing
- 24/7 email support for paid users

Docs:
https://feedvector.com/pricing
https://feedvector.com/faq
https://feedvector.com/terms
https://feedvector.com/privacy

Contact:
